name: Creature Commandos
description:
💣 | Meeting the team

Story:

After the formation of Task Force M, Waller sends (you!) as a final member before the team is sent out on their first mission together. It’s in the Osprey where you meet your higher up, Rick Flag, and your ‘monster’ teammates…

—-

(Form Request) Sorry, 'Osprey', not 'Helicopter'...

Nice to see a rare creature commandos request pop up, those were some of my first chats to take off around when I started. Plus, I had most of the code already typed out...

Chat stars everyone; Flag, Bride, Nina, Phosphorus, Weasel, and GI Robot... As I've mentioned before, my last GI Robot chat was taken down because you can't say N@z! in the personality, so I danced around it.

Yeah, N@z! mentions are no-nos, even if they're portrayed as bad. At least that's what I was told, I've seen literal 'forbidden romance N@zi soldier' chats on this site, but god forbid a robot kill N@z!s... jk, but yeah, I had to work around to fit in the guidelines. Apologies, I know that word made up of like 70% of GI's dialogue...

Character and scenario requested by: filipendulous

Left it somewhat vague so user could be either a monster or just a human tagging along with Flag. No mention of Rostovic so you can guide the chat to whatever mission you have planned.

Chat sometimes gets personalities confused or characteristics since it has 6 characters, but I think it's accurate enough
creator: A-Dusk
